form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.91) when fourth over 410m at Horsham in a Grade 4/5. Strong record off the draw with seven wins and two minors from 15 starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (23.91) when fourth over 410m at Horsham in a Grade 4/5. Strong record off the draw with seven wins and two minors from 15 starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 4/5 on April 8 over 390m at Ballarat behind Blackpool Finn beaten 5 lengths (22.64). Has a slick 22.74 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 300m at Healesville behind Happy Chick beaten 5 lengths (17.20). Has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 410m at Horsham behind Is He Happy beaten 5.5 lengths (23.97). Placed two back at Shepparton. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 460m at Geelong. Hard to tip with any confidence.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when sixth and beaten 5.5 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at Sale three back. Better than last run and looks set to run well.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (23.19) in a Grade 5, finishing a 5.5 lengths second. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Returns from a four months spell after being tipped out on the back of a minor placing (24.62) over 425m at Bendigo. Others preferred.
